---
title: "Methrix"
output: html_document
params:
    methrix_dir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_EMseq/Methrix/h5_raw/
    methrix_qc_dir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_EMseq/Methrix/h5_QC_SNP_filtered/
    outdir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/results/DMR/
    mae_hdf5_path: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_MAE/h5MAE
---

```{r}
library(methrix)
```


```{r}
print(params)
```


## Read in Methrix object from shared disk
```{r}
meth <- methrix::load_HDF5_methrix(params$methrix_dir)
```


## Select ISA file to get correct sample IDs
```{r}
isa_assay_prot <- readxl::read_xlsx('C:/Users/Casper.deVisser/Documents/ipsc-data-analysis/20240822_Xomics_iPSC_Neurons_new_READ-ONLY.xlsx', sheet = 'Assay - proteomics')
```

```{r}
library(MultiAssayExperiment)
library(HDF5Array)

mae <- loadHDF5MultiAssayExperiment(
  dir = params$mae_hdf5_path, 
  prefix = 'mae')

phenotype_data <- as.data.frame(colData(mae))
```


## Select TMEM132 region
```{r}
meth_subset <- methrix::subset_methrix(m = meth, regions = data.table(chr='chr12', start = 125671000, end =130650500))
```


## Combine with pheno df
```{r}
source('support_functions/ReadMethrix2Df.R')
df_list <- read_meth2df(meth_subset, isa_assay_prot)
df <- data.frame(t(df_list[[1]]))

# Remove mixup sample
df <- df[!rownames(df) %in% c("IPS20_00123_3"),]
```


```{r}
phenotype_data <- phenotype_data[rownames(df),]

df$Phenotype <- phenotype_data$phenotype
df$Sample <- phenotype_data$observation.unit.identifier.crispr
df$Clone <- phenotype_data$sample.description
```



## Plot methylation in the DMPK region
```{r, fig.width=15, fig.height=4}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)


## Chromosome 12
df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("chr12_"),
    names_to = "Genome_Location",
    values_to = "Measurement"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Genome_Location = as.numeric(gsub("chr12_", "", Genome_Location)))

df_avg_Sample <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Clone, Genome_Location) %>%
  summarize(Avr_Beta =  mean(Measurement), .groups= "drop")
```


## Plot function
```{r}
source('support_functions/plot_DMR.R')
```


## Bins of 10k
```{r}
library(GenomicRanges)
library(IRanges)
library(pheatmap)


df_input <- df[,c(1:58170)]

## Parse CpG coordinates
coord <- do.call(rbind, strsplit(colnames(df_input), "_", fixed =F))
chrom <- coord[,1]
pos <- as.integer(coord[,2])
#cpg_coords <- GRanges(chrom, IRanges(pos, pos))
```


## Heatmap of TMEM132D methylation
```{r}
df_positions <- df_input
colnames(df_positions) <- pos

df_TMEM132D <- df_positions[, as.numeric(names(df_positions)) >= 129071725]

df_TMEM132D_DMR <- df_positions[, as.numeric(names(df_positions)) >= 129902900]
df_TMEM132D_DMR <- df_TMEM132D_DMR[, as.numeric(names(df_TMEM132D_DMR)) <= 129904700]



make_heatmap <- function(df, labels) {
  ggp <- pheatmap(
    df,
    cluster_rows = T,
    cluster_cols = F,
    show_colnames = F,
    show_rownames = T,
    labels_row = labels  
  )
  return(ggp)
}

ggp <- make_heatmap(df_TMEM132D, phenotype_data$sample.description)
ggsave(file.path(params$outdir, 'Heatmap_TMEM32.pdf'), ggp, width = 20)

ggp <- make_heatmap(df_TMEM132D_DMR, phenotype_data$sample.description)
ggsave(file.path(params$outdir, 'Heatmap_TMEM32_DMR.pdf'), ggp, width = 10, height = 10)
```



## Heatmap of whole DMR are on Chr 12
```{r}
## Region of interest
region <- GRanges(unique(chrom)[1], IRanges(min(pos), max(pos)))

## Tile region into bins
bin_size <- 50000L
bin_index <- (pos - min(pos)) %% bin_size + 1
  
bin_df <- sapply(split(seq_along(bin_index), bin_index), function(ix) {
  rowMeans(df_input[, ix, drop = F], na.rm =T)
})
colnames(bin_df) <- paste0("bin_", sort(unique(bin_index)))

ggp <- make_heatmap(bin_df, phenotype_data$sample.description)
ggsave(file.path(params$outdir, 'Heatmap_Chr12_Locus_bins.pdf'), ggp, width = 20)
```



## Line plot
```{r, fig.width=17, fig.height=4}
# bin_df <- data.frame(bin_df)
# 
# bin_df$Sample <- df$Sample
# bin_df$Clone <- df$Clone
# 
# ## Chromosome 12
# df_long <- bin_df %>%
#   pivot_longer(
#     cols = starts_with("bin"),
#     names_to = "Genome_Location",
#     values_to = "Measurement"
#   ) 
# 
# df_avg_Sample <- df_long %>%
#   group_by(Clone, Genome_Location) %>%
#   summarize(Avr_Beta =  mean(Measurement), .groups= "drop")
# 
# 
# df_avg_Sample <- na.omit(df_avg_Sample)
# 
# 
# sample_selection <- c("DM1 patient 2 clone 1", "DM1 patient 2 clone 2", "DM1 patient 2 clone 3")
# 
# df_avg_Sample <- df_avg_Sample[df_avg_Sample$Clone %in% sample_selection,]
# 
# 
# 
# ggp <- ggplot(df_avg_Sample, aes(x = Genome_Location, y = Avr_Beta, color = Clone, group = Clone)) +
#     geom_line(size=1) +
#     labs(title = paste0('Large DMR on Chr12'), 
#          x= 'GenomeLocation',
#          y ='Beta-value') +
#     coord_cartesian(ylim =c(0, 1)) +
#     theme_bw()
# 
# ggsave('Z:/users/devissercasper/Lineplot_Chr12_Locus_bins.pdf', ggp, width = 18)
```
